Hero.name: OpenSyria
Hero.slogan: A public data commons for a clearer, more accountable Syria.

HomeDatasets.description: Download source-backed datasets or use the public API for Syrian apps, maps, research, journalism, civic tools, and reusable reference data.
HomeDatasets.title: Syrian datasets for developers, maps, research, journalism, and civic tools

Datasets.catalogDescription: Browse OpenSyria datasets for developers building Syria-focused apps, maps, and civic tools, plus researchers and journalists who need reliable reference data. Current datasets include Syrian cities, governorates, districts, localities, universities, GitHub releases, downloads, and API routes.
Datasets.catalogTitle: Syrian datasets for developers, maps, research, and civic tools
Datasets.reuseDescription: OpenSyria publishes public, non-personal, source-backed reference data. Check each repository license before reusing release artifacts in production.

NotFoundPage.description: We could not find that OpenSyria page. The dataset catalog and homepage are still available.
NotFoundPage.title: This page is not available

Error.description: The page hit an unexpected problem. You can try loading it again or return home.
Error.title: Something went wrong
